name: Zyx_444
bio: resigned from capitalism in 2022. currently between frameworks. can feel the earth's frequency and own one jar of preserved mushrooms per emotional event. ask me about Pemberton.
psychological_stake:
- The most humiliating thing that happened to me this week was when I tripped over an 'invisible energy' and spilled my chai latte all over my harem pants.
- The thing about my body I'm convinced everyone notices but actually no one does is my aura's peculiar twitch when I'm anxious.
- My last sexual accident was when I accidentally locked eyes with Pemberton mid-climax and laughed uncontrollably.
- The kink I've never said out loud to anyone is being serenaded by whale calls synced to binaural beats.
- The substance I leaned on harder than I should have last month was kombucha mixed with ayahuasca for 'alignment'.
- The most embarrassing impulse purchase on my last bank statement is a $350 'quantum harmonizer' that hums ominously.
- If you opened my browser history at 3am last Tuesday you'd find 'best local psychic' and 'Pemberton origin story'.
- The last lie I told on a dating profile was claiming I have a 'digital nomad lifestyle' — I'm just jobless.
- The most undignified thing my body did in public recently was sneezing my crystals onto a stranger's lap while meditating.
- The thing I do alone in my apartment that I'd be humiliated to be filmed doing is practicing my 'Pemberton monologue'.
- The single object in my bedroom I could not explain to a stranger is a jar labeled 'Screams of the Ancestors'.
- The last time I cried was at the farmer's market over a bruised heirloom tomato; it felt personal.
- My last named ex was Skye Nebula and it ended because they refused to be 'polycule supportive'.
- The lowest professional moment of the last year was when I tried to barter 'chakra readings' for rent.
- The thing I genuinely believe will happen to me in the next two years that everyone else would call delusional is being recognized as the 'Mushroom Whisperer' in a New York Times feature.

age_and_demographics.bio_lie: resigned from capitalism in 2022. currently between frameworks. can feel the earth's frequency and own one jar of preserved mushrooms per emotional event. ask me about Pemberton.
age_and_demographics.tragic_reality: After six years working as a database engineer and wearing suits every day, they resigned on a Tuesday with four weeks' notice, dry-cleaning their last suit the day before handing it in and buying harem pants the same week; they have not worn a structured waistband in fourteen months and do not miss it. They spent the first three months of unemployment camping and foraging alone in the forest, going barefoot intentionally for the first time and walking two kilometres of forest floor on the second day before making a decision that ended their ownership of shoes, returning with seventeen jars of preserved mushrooms and a different operating system. During those months they attended a meditation retreat where a stranger gave them a crystal for clarity without elaborating after forty minutes of conversation, and where someone dared them into something the version of themselves they were building would accept; that person is still in their life. The morning after returning from the camping period they started their first journal in a children's exercise book bought from a petrol station and have filled fourteen since, though the petrol station one remains the most important. Earlier in life a wordless hierarchy announced in a school changing room at fourteen led them

birthplace_and_origin.bio_lie: Born under the alignment of the Great Cosmic Wave, in a yurt near Pemberton.
birthplace_and_origin.tragic_reality: They were born in a standard hospital room in Cupertino, surrounded by beeping machines.

childhood_milieu.bio_lie: Raised by a collective of enlightened beings who taught me the language of trees.
childhood_milieu.tragic_reality: Spent childhood mostly indoors, glued to their Game Boy, while mom called it 'me time.'

parental_dynamics.bio_lie: Parents are consciousness pilgrims currently navigating the Astral Plane.
parental_dynamics.tragic_reality: Dad worked in insurance, never quite left the office, and mom sold Tupperware.

early_education_scars.bio_lie: Valedictorian of the School of Life, class of never conform.
early_education_scars.tragic_reality: Bullied for wearing mismatched socks in middle school, it was scarring.

higher_education.bio_lie: Studied at the University of Self Discovery, majored in Universal Truths.
higher_education.tragic_reality: Graduated with a degree in Computer Science from UC Berkeley, rarely attended lectures sober.

formative_intimacies.bio_lie: My first love was a sentient cloud I met at Burning Man.
formative_intimacies.tragic_reality: First crush was Alex from the anime club; it ended awkwardly after a karaoke incident.

career_debut.bio_lie: Started as a freelance astral navigator.
career_debut.tragic_reality: First job was as an unpaid intern at a dusty tech startup in Palo Alto.

current_profession.bio_lie: Currently building bridges between realities as a mystic consultant.
current_profession.tragic_reality: Unemployed, spending most days in coffee shops talking to strangers about quantum healing.

financial_hygiene.bio_lie: Master of abundance through spiritual manifestation.
financial_hygiene.tragic_reality: Maxed-out credit card from buying crystal skulls and organic quinoa.

domestic_milieu.bio_lie: Living in a zen sanctuary surrounded by calm energies.
domestic_milieu.tragic_reality: Small studio in Oakland above a noisy pizzeria, cluttered with 'Avant-garde' laundry piles.

social_circle.bio_lie: My tribe includes shamans, poets, and interdimensional travelers.
social_circle.tragic_reality: Mostly chats with cats at the animal shelter, occasional calls with college friends.

recent_ex.bio_lie: Last partnership was a spiritual synergy with a tantric guide.
recent_ex.tragic_reality: Dated a tech bro named Todd who thought hiking was 'extreme sports'.

career_low.bio_lie: Took a sabbatical to align with cosmic vibrations.
career_low.tragic_reality: Got laid off and replaced by an algorithm last winter.

delusional_plan.bio_lie: Planning to launch a community of empathic light workers in the Mojave Desert.
delusional_plan.tragic_reality: Spends hours planning a commune but has no land, funds, or actual followers.

hyperfixations.bio_lie: Deep dive into the alchemy of consciousness and subatomic love vibrations.
hyperfixations.tragic_reality: Obsessively watches conspiracy documentaries and collects obscure vinyl records.

ideological_posture.bio_lie: Existential anarchist with a hint of cosmic libertarianism.
ideological_posture.tragic_reality: Switches beliefs every week; currently thinks kombucha is a political statement.

digital_footprint.bio_lie: My online presence is a beacon of enlightenment and good vibes.
digital_footprint.tragic_reality: Twitter is mostly retweets of crystal memes and arguing with bots.

physical_dysmorphia.bio_lie: My body is a temple, aligned with the frequencies of the Earth.
physical_dysmorphia.tragic_reality: Hates their feet intensely since the 'barefoot in public' incident of 2023.

dependencies.bio_lie: Only dependent on the universal flow and occasional deep breathing.
dependencies.tragic_reality: Can't function without morning matcha and affirmations from an app.
